zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen de Thornham於大約1165年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Baron Robert de Turnham27歲，母親Baroness Joan de Fossard48歲。他於1196年與Edeline de Broc在英國英格蘭素可安莫林結婚。他們至少是7個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年3月在英國素瑞阿廷頓享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特古度爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen de Thornham于大约1165年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲Baron Robert de Turnham27岁，母亲Baroness Joan de Fossard48岁。他于1196年与Edeline de Broc在英国英格兰素可安莫林结婚。他们至少是7个女儿的父母。他去世于1214年3月在英国素瑞阿廷頓享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特古度爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thornham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: locative name from Thorneholme in Burton Agnes (ER Yorks), recorded as Thurnum in 1333.
2  English: locative name from Thornham (Norfolk), Thornham Magna and Parva (Suffolk), or Thurnham (Kent), and perhaps other places similarly named, such as Great and Little Thurnham (Lancs).

variants.name: Thorman
meanings: English (Durham and Nottinghamshire): variant of Thurman or Thornham. The latter is a habitational name, from either Thorneholme in Yorkshire or places called Thornham in Norfolk, Suffolk, Kent or Lancashire.
Americanized form of Danish and North German Thormann: elaborated form of the personal name Thor + -mann ‘man’.
Americanized form of German Thormann: topographic name for someone living at the (city) gate.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen de Thornham was born about 1165, in Shropshire, England, his father, Baron Robert de Turnham, was 27 and his mother, Baroness Joan de Fossard, was 48. He married Edeline de Broc in 1196, in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 daughters. He died in March 1214, in Artington, Surrey, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Goudhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen de Thornham est né environ 1165, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Baron Robert de Turnham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Baroness Joan de Fossard, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Edeline de Broc en 1196, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 filles. Il est décédé en mars 1214, à Artington, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Goudhurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen de Thornham um 1165 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Robert de Turnham 27 und seine Mutter Baroness Joan de Fossard 48. Er hat 1196 in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Edeline de Broc geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Töchter. Er starb im März 1214 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Artington, Surrey, England und wurde in Goudhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Thornham è nato il circa 1165 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Baron Robert de Turnham, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Joan de Fossard, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Edeline de Broc nel 1196, nel Angmering, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1214, nel Artington, Surrey, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Goudhurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen de Thornhamが約1165年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Baron Robert de Turnhamは27歳，母Baroness Joan de Fossardは48歳であった。1196年にイギリスイギリススセックスアングメリングでEdeline de Brocと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の娘の親であった。彼は1214年3月にイギリススリーアルティントンで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントゴウドハルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen de Thornham(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Robert de Turnham(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Joan de Fossard(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1196년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 앤그머잉에서 Edeline de Broc(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 3월 영국 수리 아틴그턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 고우드후르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Thornham nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron Robert de Turnham, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Joan de Fossard, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Edeline de Broc em 1196, em Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em março de 1214, em Artington, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Goudhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen de Thornham родился около 1165 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron Robert de Turnham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Joan de Fossard, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Edeline de Broc в 1196 г. в местности ангмиринг, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 дочерей. Он умер марта 1214 г. в местности артингтон, сурри, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности гоудхурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen de Thornham nació aproximadamente 1165, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Baron Robert de Turnham, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Baroness Joan de Fossard, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Edeline de Broc en 1196, en Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1214, en Artington, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Goudhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
